name: io.github.csacanam/comprabtc
description: Non-custodial Bitcoin DCA for agent treasuries: approve USDT once, stack WBTC on Celo forever.

environmentVariables.name: COMPRABTC_WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Treasury/agent wallet that owns the plan (holds USDT, signs setup txs, receives WBTC). Required only for create/renew/cancel; reads work without it.

environmentVariables.name: COMPRABTC_MAX_PER_RUN_USDT
environmentVariables.description: Safety cap per installment in USDT (default 50, pool-depth guard).
